intents.text: Asking the agent to take over the task.
User explains they were running in a directory with no user extensions loaded.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: i was running it in ../shittycodingagent.ai/ and i think i have no user extensions loaded

intents.text: How can we fix the missing user extensions issue?
Apply the same fix in prc and print/json mode.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: we need to do the same in prc and print(json mode

intents.text: What concise solution would make agent-session.ts reload() handle rewiring extensions and contexts instead of modes?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: agent-session.ts reload() would handle the rewiring of extensions and contexts

intents.text: UI context must be registered before session.reload() so extensions' session_start events can do UI things.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: if we registered the ui context after session.reload(), extensions might already have been run

intents.text: Commit, push, and add a changelog entry.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: commit and push, add a changelog entry
